key_risks: Semiconductor/AI momentum reversal or sharp factor rotation
Hot June CPI/PPI prints reprice rates higher, hitting growth and EM
Geopolitical shock to Taiwan/Korea supply chain
Crude weakness signaling demand slowdown hits industrials

portfolio.rationale: Strong momentum, AI capex cycle intact, leading sector with 16% 30d return.
Semi supply chain leverage with strong momentum and global electronics demand.
Solid Philly Fed new orders 27.3, positive momentum, cyclical tailwind.
Benchmark anchor given mixed macro and sticky inflation risks.
Hedge after -7% drawdown; inflation risks skewed to upside per FOMC.

portfolio_rationale: Tilt toward AI/semiconductor momentum (SMH, Taiwan) and cyclical industrials given strong Philly Fed and retail sales, anchored by SPY and a gold hedge against sticky inflation.
rationale_summary: Pro-cyclical, AI-led equity tilt with benchmark anchor and gold hedge for one-month window.
